posts.text:
There have now been four jihadist attacks on the US homeland in the last two weeks and one at the school I took my kids to see Disney on Ice at.

Don’t try and gaslight me Muslim extemism isn’t a full blown crisis in this country.

posts.text:
I am praying for our Jewish brothers and sisters.

You are not alone, we stand with you. We will continue to fight hard against the poisons of antisemitism alongside you.

My heart bleeds for the Jewish community and the evil hatred that is engulfing our country so fast.
